reason: frontend layer entry: component/hook/state guidelines for InputBox submit routing + App queue handlers
InputBox props conventions (onSteer/onFollowUp callbacks); overlay non-null => InputBox unmounted
useHarnessState already projects queue_update; no new subscription; queue read via state.queue
queue is harness-derived state (HarnessState.queue); editor text is local UI state; restore bridges them
steer/followUp/abort failures must surface as notice, not throw uncaught
queue projection owned by useHarnessState; InputBox/App consume state.queue, do not re-parse events
